lockdown_hoax.extracted_text: सरकार ने घोषणा की है कि कल रात 12 बजे से पूरे देश में सम्पूर्ण लॉकडाउन लागू होगा। सभी राज्यों में धारा 144 लागू। WhatsApp पर आगे भेजें।
lockdown_hoax.explanation: Matches known lockdown misinformation pattern circulated in 2021. No official government order exists with this language.

fake_upi.extracted_text: Congratulations! Your UPI payment of ₹50,000 has been received. Click here to claim your KYC reward: bit.ly/upi-claim-now. Offer valid for 24 hours only.
fake_upi.explanation: Matches known UPI fraud pattern. Fake payment confirmation screenshot used to harvest KYC credentials. Shortened URL leads to phishing domain.

fake_circular.extracted_text: भारत सरकार — गृह मंत्रालय। परिपत्र संख्या: MHA/2024/09/CONF। विषय: राष्ट्रीय आपातकाल की घोषणा हेतु प्रस्ताव। यह पत्र गोपनीय है।
fake_circular.explanation: Document bears forged Ministry of Home Affairs letterhead. No such circular exists in official government records. ELA analysis reveals digital manipulation in seal area.

real_news.extracted_text: Press Information Bureau — Government of India. PM Narendra Modi inaugurates the new AIIMS campus in Rajkot, Gujarat. The facility will serve over 20 lakh patients annually. Official PIB Release dated 06 March 2024.
real_news.explanation: Document verified against official PIB records. EXIF metadata intact and consistent with government press release publication workflow. No signs of digital manipulation detected.

ai_tweet.extracted_text: Just confirmed: I am leaving India forever due to the toxic political environment. This country no longer deserves my work. Goodbye. — [Celebrity Name] ✔
ai_tweet.explanation: AI-generated tweet screenshot fabricated using a UI cloning tool. Verified tweet handle shows no such post. ELA reveals near-zero compression history consistent with a synthetic screenshot. Typography and checkmark badge are inconsistent with the official Twitter/X UI.
